description: Creature design — first wave. Subject IDs match this domain's lane id_patterns (concept_, ortho_, action_) so `sdlab generate` will route each candidate into the correct lane instead of default_lane.

defaults.negative: photorealistic, photograph, 3d render, smooth CG, sharp photo detail

subjects.prompt: oil painting, visible brushstrokes, [DESCRIBE YOUR CREATURE — initial concept, ideation exploration], painterly concept art, canvas grain
oil painting, visible brushstrokes, [DESCRIBE YOUR CREATURE — turnaround model sheet, orthographic views for modelers], painterly concept art, canvas grain
oil painting, visible brushstrokes, [DESCRIBE YOUR CREATURE — attack stance, locomotion study, movement key], painterly concept art, canvas grain
